name: core-sentinel-hmi-workspace
description: ISA-101 compliant HMI for InRebus DAO LFR-4G Unit 4 - Lead-Cooled Fast Reactor

scripts.dev: npm run build:remotes && concurrently -k -n TELEMETRY,3DTWIN,CONFIG,SHELL -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run preview --workspace=packages/mfe-telemetry" "npm run preview --workspace=packages/mfe-3d-twin" "npm run preview --workspace=packages/mfe-config" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/shell"
scripts.build:remotes: concurrently "npm run build --workspace=packages/mfe-telemetry" "npm run build --workspace=packages/mfe-3d-twin" "npm run build --workspace=packages/mfe-config"
scripts.lint: eslint packages/shared/src/ packages/shell/src/ packages/mfe-telemetry/src/ packages/mfe-3d-twin/src/ packages/mfe-config/src/
